Competes with Lynas (LYC AU) and Chinese rare earth processors. Watch for construction milestones, separation plant at Sept-Iles, and first production.

rounds.robotnik_notes: Defence drone company manufacturing NDAA-compliant UAS including C100 and AM-FPV combat drones. $110M Series B led by Ondas Holdings; 90,000 sq ft plant with 100K drones/yr capacity. Competes with AeroVironment (AVAV), Kratos (KTOS), and Skydio. $20.9M Army contract validates defence traction. Watch for US Army programme-of-record expansion and NATO procurement.

rounds.other_investors: Lightspeed Venture Partners, Thrive Capital, Lux Capital
rounds.robotnik_notes: Foundation model company for robot control, developing vision-language-action (VLA) models ('ChatGPT for robots'). $1B Series C from Founders Fund at $11B valuation — would double valuation in 4 months from $5.6B; $2B total raised since Mar 2024. Competes with Skild AI, Google DeepMind Robotics, and Tesla (TSLA) in generalist robot intelligence. Watch for commercial licensing to robot OEMs and real-world deployment benchmarks.
